returns.nextAction: Upload brokerage 1099-B and answer home office question.
Review Smart Review adjustment for meals limitation.

fields.label: Taxable interest
fields.calculation: Rounded to whole dollars for Form 1040.

fields.label: K-1 ordinary business income
fields.calculation: Mapped from K-1 Box 1 to Schedule E passive income section.

fields.label: Home office expense
fields.sourceText: Rent + utilities allocated to 11.6% business use.
fields.calculation: (Rent 26,400 + utilities 4,738) x 11.6%; locked until client answers square footage question.

threads.title: Confirm dedicated home office square footage

messages.author: Jordan Lee
messages.body: Can you confirm the room is used only for business and provide its square footage?

messages.author: Priya Shah
messages.body: Do not approve Form 8829 until the exclusivity answer is explicit.

messages.author: Jordan Lee
messages.body: EasyTax mapped this as passive. Prior-year note says Maya materially participated.

onboarding.headline: Two items are blocking your return.

aiRecommendations.title: Limit business meals to 50%
aiRecommendations.why: Receipts categorized as client meals and no exception evidence was found.
aiRecommendations.confirmationReason: No confirmation is needed because the receipts, ledger category, and return treatment all agree.
proof: All 16 ledger entries are categorized as client meals.
Receipts on pages 8-10 show restaurant names and attendee notes.
No receipt is marked as a firm event, staff event, or reimbursed expense.
aiRecommendations.uncertainty: Two receipts are handwritten and may be staff events instead.

aiRecommendations.title: Review passive activity classification
aiRecommendations.recommendation: Ask the CPA to confirm whether Maya materially participated before approving Schedule E treatment.
aiRecommendations.why: Current-year K-1 lacks participation detail and conflicts with last year's workpaper note.
aiRecommendations.confirmationReason: Confirmation is needed because the submitted K-1 does not state participation, and prior-year notes say Maya materially participated.
proof: K-1 page 4 shows ordinary business income but no participation statement.
Prior-year workpaper says Maya materially participated.
The client questionnaire has not answered the participation question.
aiRecommendations.uncertainty: Needs CPA judgment before the return can be finalized.
